picks.title: 420 in the Park featuring The Legendary Wailers & Baby Bash
picks.why: Legendary reggae and Latin hip-hop acts perform live at a rare San Jose festival celebrating Bay Area culture.

picks.title: Palo Alto Earth Day Festival
picks.why: Palo Alto's annual Earth Day Festival offers hands-on sustainability learning and community celebration in one of the Valley's most walkable downtowns.

picks.title: Book Launch with Randy Ribay
picks.why: Award-winning author Randy Ribay launches a new book with an intimate Los Altos bookstore event—direct access to a celebrated local writer.
